Ready to Order?

Reach Us &
We'll Handle
the Rest

No complicated checkout — simply reach out via WhatsApp or phone, tell us what you'd like, and we'll confirm your order within the hour.

💬 Message Us WhatsApp Quick replies · Easy ordering 📞 Call Us By Phone 01126537788 · 01101826143
🌾
Our Story

Born from a
Love of Craft

Lavwar was founded in 2000 by Chef Isabelle Moreau, trained in the finest kitchens of Paris. Her vision was simple: to bring the soul of the French boulangerie to a local neighborhood, without compromise.

Every item on our menu is made from scratch, every single day — with organic flours, cultured butters, and seasonal ingredients sourced from nearby farms.

Your Order Journey
01
Order Confirmed
Received and confirmed via WhatsApp by our team.
02
Being Prepared
Our bakers are hand-crafting your items fresh in the kitchen.
03
Packed & Ready
Carefully boxed and ready for handoff to your rider.
04
Out for Delivery
On the way. Your rider will WhatsApp you an ETA shortly.
🥐
Behind the Scenes

From Our Hands
to Your Table

Every piece that leaves our kitchen follows the same sacred process — no shortcuts, no compromises.

🌾
5:00 AM
Step 01

Source & Measure

Each morning starts before sunrise. We measure organic flours, cultured butters, and hand-select seasonal ingredients — everything weighed to the gram.

🫙
6:00 AM
Step 02

Mix & Laminate

Our croissant dough is hand-laminated with 27 layers of butter — a two-hour process that gives each pastry its signature honeycomb flakiness.

⏳
8:00 AM
Step 03

Proof & Rest

We never rush fermentation. Doughs rest for a minimum of 12 hours — slow cold fermentation develops depth of flavour that can't be faked.

🔥
10:00 AM
Step 04

Bake & Serve

Into our deck oven at exactly 210°C. When that golden crust forms and the scent fills the bakery — that's the moment everything was made for. Fresh batches, every single day.

Taste the difference that time and care make.

Simple Process

How to
Order

01
Browse the Menu
Browse our full menu of breads, pastries, cookies and more. Each item shows the price and description.
02
Add to Cart
Choose your quantity and tap Add to Cart. You can add as many items as you like and adjust quantities anytime.
03
Order & Leave it to Us
When you're ready, tap Place Order. Enter your phone and address — we'll take care of the rest and contact you to confirm.
Got Questions?

Frequently Asked
Questions

We deliver across Old Cairo, Maadi, Downtown, Garden City, Heliopolis, Nasr City, and more. Delivery fees are confirmed at checkout via WhatsApp.
We are open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. You can place an order at any time and we will confirm availability via WhatsApp.
There is no minimum order for pickup. For delivery, a minimum order may apply depending on your area — this will be confirmed when you place your order via WhatsApp.
Breads and pastries are best enjoyed fresh on the day of delivery. Cookies and rusks can be stored in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 weeks.
Yes! We welcome bulk orders for events, offices, and gatherings. Contact us directly on WhatsApp at 01126537788 to discuss your needs and we will prepare a custom quote.
Most of our products contain gluten, dairy, and eggs. Some items contain nuts or sesame. If you have a specific allergy, please mention it when ordering via WhatsApp and we will advise accordingly.
We currently accept cash on delivery. Our team will confirm the total including delivery fee via WhatsApp before dispatching your order.
